allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\Demo Website\\ERP"; $env:NODE_ENV = "production"; npx next build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40)

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\Demo Website\\ERP"; Get-ChildItem .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Remove-Item .next -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cleared"; $output = npx next build 2>&1; $output | Select-Object -Last 25)
